title: Abou Ben Adhem in Hindi | Roots and Wings Class 6 | Ch 13 | Difficult Words in Description
description:
is a short, fable-like poem that suggests people can best express love for God by simply loving their fellow human beings. ... The poem ultimately argues that love of humankind is the love of God—because people are God's creation

Difficult Words
Tribe - Ethnic Group 
Awoke - Wake from sleep
Within - Inside the Range of 
Exceeding - Very Great 
Bold - Showing Willingness To Take Risk 
Presence - Existence 
Writest - Write 
Thou - You 
Cheerily - In a happy Way 
Thee - You 
Fellow - A Man or Boy
Vanished - Disappear
